title: Brian Ching
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Person
|image=[[File:Brianching.jpg]]
|name=Brian Ching
|birth=
|death=

'''Brian Ching''' is an artist for the [[Dark Horse Comics]]. His work includes the ''[[Star Wars: Obsession]]'' series.

After illustrating the launching issues of [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|Knights of the Old Republic comic]] and then a select few afterward, began work on [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (comic)|The Force Unleashed graphic novel]]. He was supposed to move on to the [[Star Wars: Rebellion (comic series)|Rebellion comics]]<ref name="Blog">{{Blogspot|subdomain=brianching|url=2007/05/thanks.html|name=the art of brian ching|text=Thanks...|date=2007-05-09}}</ref><ref name="SWB">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=222689&start=04740#16631159|thread=Books, Comics, & Television VIPs|user=[[Sue Rostoni]]|date=2007-05-28|time=9:06 AM|quote=Here's the scoop on Brian Ching -- After drawing The Force Unleashed comics Brian will move to Rebellion -- awesome.}}</ref> though the series was canceled after being put on hold. Ching went back to drawing for Knights of the Old Republic regularly with [[Bong Dazo]].

{{Artist-stub}}
